title: Not at Home to Callers by Emily Dickinson
content:
Not at Home to Callers
Says the Naked Tree --
Bonnet due in April --
Wishing you Good Day --

title: Defrauded I a Butterfly -- by Emily Dickinson
content:
Defrauded I a Butterfly --
The lawful Heir -- for Thee --

title: The words the happy say by Emily Dickinson
content:
The words the happy say
Are paltry melody
But those the silent feel
Are beautiful --

title: Summer begins to have the look by Emily Dickinson
content:
Summer begins to have the look
Peruser of enchanting Book
Reluctantly but sure perceives
A gain upon the backward leaves --

Autumn begins to be infer

title: The Notice that is called the Spring by Emily Dickinson
content:
The Notice that is called the Spring
Is but a month from here --
Put up my Heart thy Hoary work
And take a Rosy Chair.

Not any House the Flowers keep
